rationale: Gov't Code §2306.003 authorizes public money expenditures for housing-related public purposes. Increasing the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with this enabling provision.
quote: The duties imposed and activities authorized by this chapter serve public purposes, and public money may be borrowed, spent, advanced, loaned, granted, or appropriated for those purposes.
_note: No conflict; §2306.003 is a general public-purpose authorization and does not constrain homestead exemption amounts.
